android_app_implementation_kickoff_trigg.rationale: iOS + web are the production surfaces. Android token + adaptation layer is maintained as documentation (config-android.json + android-token-mapping.md + android-adaptation.md) but no Android app code exists. Building one is a multi-month commitment that would dilute focus during pre-launch hygiene.
reevaluation_triggers: App Store launch + first 1000 iOS WAU sustained 30 days (demand signal)
External partner request (school project, contract, contributor)
Annual review on 2027-05-26 (default cadence; explicit "stay deferred" decision recorded each year)
